Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 307}Don't you feel completely lost whenever you transfer to a new school?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 307}This is the second floor, and the one below has the faculty office, club rooms, and more hands-on classes.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 307}If you go down either of the two staircases, you'll be able to reach the front entrance.[n]{f 1 1}
